caption: The video features an elderly man with white hair and glasses, dressed in a blue shirt adorned with a colorful sash, standing at a podium in what appears to be a formal event or presentation. He is speaking into a microphone, gesturing with his hands as he addresses an audience seated in front of him. The setting includes wooden paneling in the background and a sign on the podium that reads "Kellogg-Hubbard Library," suggesting the event is taking place in a library. The man seems engaged and passionate about his topic, possibly sharing stories or insights with the attentive audience. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, indicating the organization or group associated with the event.
